result.finding: Multi-stage Dockerfile with 2 stages. The final runtime image contains approximately 3 Dockerfile-added layers (WORKDIR, COPY, ENV) on top of the eclipse-temurin:8-jre base image layers (~5-8 base layers), yielding an estimated total of 8-11 layers. The build stage is discarded, keeping the final image lean.
evidence: Stage 1 (build): FROM maven:3.9.6-eclipse-temurin-8 AS build — 2 RUN + 2 COPY instructions (discarded in final image)
Stage 2 (final): FROM eclipse-temurin:8-jre — 1 WORKDIR + 1 COPY --from=build + 1 ENV instruction
No additional RUN commands in final stage (no package installs)
Single-command RUN instructions in build stage (no chaining optimization needed)
COPY pom.xml separately from COPY src to leverage Docker layer cache for dependency downloads
values: Estimated total layers in final image: ~8-11
